options.name: <pin_port_list>
options.description: Specifies the pin/port list for which annotated delay is to be reported

options.name: -ignore_tied_low_high_net_arcs
options.description: Ignores timing arcs of power and ground nets

options.name: -list_annotated
options.description: Specifies the annotated arcs are to be reported

options.name: -list_non_annotated
options.description: Specifies the non annotated arcs are to be reported

options.name: -max_line
options.description: Upper bound for the number of lines to be reported for each type of delay arcs.

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Specifies the output to be in tcl list format

options.name: -view
options.description: View for which slack is to be reported. Default is worst of all views (string, optional) > <file_name[.gz]> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name[.gz]> # Redirect output to file
